player_notes.kevin durant: Questionable for Game 1 vs. Lakers with a right knee contusion sustained in practice. Rockets are optimistic but monitor official status closely — significant prop risk if he sits or is limited.
player_notes.james harden: Now with the Cavaliers after a midseason trade; Cavs are a substantially different team than the Raptors faced in November. Harden likely in a primary playmaking role for CLE in this playoff series.
player_notes.jock landale: Out at least two weeks to start playoffs (sprained right ankle). Minor rotation impact for ATL vs. NYK — potential slight uptick for Hawks' other big men.

game_notes.HOU vs LAL: Kevin Durant questionable (knee contusion) for Game 1 — if he misses or is restricted, significant role/usage redistribution for Rockets' supporting cast.
game_notes.ATL vs NYK: Hawks backup C Jock Landale out for at least first two weeks with a sprained ankle — minimal but notable rotation shift for Atlanta bigs.
